message:
chore: update test fixtures and remove unused CurrentDirGuard

- Rename test provider from "openai" to "openai-codex" in app.rs model
  selection tests to match current registry state
- Update copilot.rs cassette version from "1" to "1.0" for consistency
  with stricter semver-like format
- Remove dead CurrentDirGuard struct from config.rs tests (unsafe in
  parallel test execution and no longer referenced)
- Update issue tracker status for bd-1kwsm, bd-mjxes, and bd-3bcjq

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
